missions.title: Oscillations and Waves - Section 1
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering periodic motion, SHM equation, amplitude and more.

microtargets.title: Periodic motion
mustKnowFacts: Periodic motion is a fundamental subtopic of Oscillations and Waves.
Crucial to understand the principles governing Periodic motion for NEET.
commonTraps: Students often misinterpret Periodic motion during complex MCQs.
Failing to apply the correct logic for Periodic motion.
masteryCriteria: Can accurately solve numericals or identify structures related to Periodic motion.
pyqPatterns: Past year questions frequently ask about Periodic motion.

activeRecallQuestions.question: Explain the core concept behind Periodic motion.
What is a common trap associated with Periodic motion?
